metadata.description: Zeyden's private Claude Code marketplace: KMP development experts, code-lifecycle workflow, issue trackers, knowledge tools, and Tabby backend skills.

plugins.name: kmp-dev
plugins.description: Kotlin Multiplatform development experts: Kotlin, coroutines, Compose, Gradle, Android, Desktop, kotlin-inject, SQLDelight, Notebook.

plugins.name: workflow
plugins.description: Code lifecycle workflows (commit, review, ticket-to-merge) plus developer/code-reviewer/test-runner agents.

plugins.name: issue-tracking
plugins.description: Jira, Linear, Lokalise, BambooHR + writer agent. Requires the corresponding MCP servers in ~/.claude.json.

plugins.name: tabby-backend
plugins.description: Tabby-internal: Go backend patterns and BDUI Sanity widgets. Work-Mac only.
